name: wmkf_proposalbudgetline
description: Intake-portal slice 0. Per-year, per-category budget rows drained from the applicant intake portal, child of akoya_request (parental, cascade delete). Cost-share rows live here too via wmkf_category 100000006-100000008 — WMKF-spend aggregate queries must filter wmkf_category NOT IN (100000006,100000007,100000008). Working name (wmkf_proposalbudgetline vs wmkf_budgetline) pending Connor naming review per docs/INTAKE_PORTAL_SCHEMA_CHANGES.md. Authoritative spec: docs/BUDGET_FORM_SPEC.md v3 + docs/INTAKE_PORTAL_SCHEMA_CHANGES.md 2026-05-14 entry.

primaryNameAttribute.description: Synthesized display string: Y{year} — {category}: {description}. PA cover-doc builder may regenerate its own grouping strings; this is the picker/grid label.

attributes.description: Program year this line belongs to (1-based). Integer not Choice — forward-compatible across program lengths.

Budget category. 100000000-100000005 are WMKF-spend (Indirect reserved, always $0). 100000006-100000008 are cost-share — excluded from the WMKF-requested aggregate, summed into akoya_request.wmkf_totalothersources. Integer values reserved 2026-05-14 (S150); DO NOT renumber after deploy — Connor PAs / drain guards / packet builder hardcode these.

USD amount for this line. One value per row (the row IS one year). Negative values rejected by the drain server-side before createRecord — Dataverse Money MinValue is set to 0 here but the drain is the authoritative guard (docs/INTAKE_PORTAL_SCHEMA_CHANGES.md 2026-05-14 'Drain server-side validation').
Fixed-row discriminator for catalog rows only (principal-investigators, consumable-supplies, facilities-overhead); null for dynamic rows.
Personnel-only (wmkf_category = 100000000 Personnel); null otherwise. Whole-number percent 0-100.

relationships.lookupDescription: The proposal this budget line belongs to. Parental: deleting the request cascades delete to its budget lines.
